heading: Omitted
label: 1421 to 1427 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1421 to 1427 of this title, which related to the sale of public land, were omitted pursuant to , which terminated this authority.section 1427 of this titleSection 1421, , , , authorized and directed Secretary of the Interior to dispose of public lands in tracts not exceeding a certain size at the appraised fair market value thereof.Pub. L. 88–608, § 178 Stat. 988Sept. 19, 1964Section 1422, , , , related to notification of local zoning authority by the Secretary of the Interior.Pub. L. 88–608, § 278 Stat. 988Sept. 19, 1964Section 1423, , , , related to notice of land offerings by publication.Pub. L. 88–608, § 378 Stat. 989Sept. 19, 1964Section 1424, , , , related to title reservations.Pub. L. 88–608, § 478 Stat. 989Sept. 19, 1964Section 1425, , , , defined “public lands”, “qualified governmental agency”, and “qualified individual”.Pub. L. 88–608, § 578 Stat. 989Sept. 19, 1964Section 1426, , , , related to sales in Alaska.Pub. L. 88–608, § 678 Stat. 989Sept. 19, 1964Section 1427, , , ; , , , provided that authority granted by this subchapter expire six months after final report of the Public Land Law Review Commission, which report was to be submitted not later than , except that sales concerning which notice had been given in accordance with prior to such time could be consummated and patents issued in connection therewith after such time.Pub.
